docs:
# Marquee
An endlessly looping strip for logos, pills, or small content rows.
## Import
```tsx
import { Marquee } from "@/components/ui/marquee";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Marquee reverse={false} pauseOnHover repeat={4} duration="22s" rowHeight={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **reverse** (boolean) — default: `false`: Reverse
- **pauseOnHover** (boolean) — default: `true`: Pause on hover
- **repeat** (number) — default: `4`: Repeat
- **duration** (number) — default: `22`: Duration (s)
- **rowHeight** (number): Row height (rem)
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add marquee
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/marquee
```
